title: rubus paramollis
intro: Rubus paramollis, also known as Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Rubus paramollis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried extract for its medicinal and health benefits.
